description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSVC Tests that runs on push and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: test-cppwinrt and build-nuget. The test-cppwinrt job runs on windows-latest, uses a matrix strategy to test different architectures and configurations, checks out the repository, runs a test script, uploads test logs, and checks for test failures. The build-nuget job runs on windows-latest, checks out the repository, packages the NuGet package using a script, and uploads the package artifact.
